notes: Keep this template pending until Uniswap publishes official Arc v4 addresses and the project initializes official pools.
Use status=draft for populated offline preflight. Use status=ready only when OFFICIAL_ARC_RPC_URL can verify official PoolManager receipts.
When populated, every official pool must use the official Uniswap Arc PoolManager, not the self-deployed Arc testnet PoolManagers.
The checker verifies populated pool count, unique family/symbol labels, unique poolIds, official PoolManager matching sourceDeploymentInput, and hook low-14 permission bits.
Ready files must include concrete StateView and subgraph evidence fields for every official pool, not only status=verified labels.
Ready files must include official exact-input Quoter evidence for FxHedgeHook or an explicit custom-route caveat for non-generic hooks.
Ready files must include official Universal Router execution evidence for FxHedgeHook or an explicit custom-route caveat for non-generic hook execution.
When OFFICIAL_ARC_RPC_URL is set, the checker also verifies initializeTx emits PoolManager Initialize and firstLiquidityTx emits a positive PoolManager ModifyLiquidity event.
Only set routerActiveClaim=true after firstLiquidityTx is published and StateView/subgraph liquidity checks pass.
Run OFFICIAL_ARC_POOL_PUBLICATION_INPUT=<populated-file> bun run uniswap:official-arc:pools:check before claiming official Arc indexing readiness.
Use the same OFFICIAL_ARC_POOL_PUBLICATION_INPUT value for bun run uniswap:stateview:check and bun run uniswap:subgraph:check so those gates verify the published official pool records.
